name: Coffee Bean Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kahlúa, Tia Maria, or any type of coffee liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. FOR FROSTING: In a saucepan, combine butter, cocoa powder, and milk. Bring to a boil.
Stir in vanilla extract and powdered sugar until the frosting reaches the proper consistency.
3. BROWNIES: In another saucepan, combine butter, shortening, coffee, and liqueur. Stir until melted.
Add the buttermilk, eggs, baking soda, and vanilla extract to the mixture.
4. In a large mixing bowl, sift together flour and sugar. Pour the butter-shortening mixture into the
flour mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Spread the batter evenly in a prepared 17 x 21/2 x 11-inch jelly roll pan.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until the brownies are set in the center.
7. Frost the cooled brownies immediately.
8. Garnish with chocolate-covered espresso beans, if desired.
9. Let the brownies cool before cutting into bars.
